subcodes.first_line: O world traveler! Thy letter was received and, owing to lack of time, a brief reply is herewith written. Under the shelter of the Beauty [3.5s]
subcodes.first_line_orig: ای جهان پیما نامه شما رسید از عدم فرصت جواب مختصر مرقوم می گردد در پناه جمال
subcodes.subjects: @steadfastness; perseverance; faithfulness, @martyrs and martyrdom, @acknowledgment of gift; of monetary contribution
